name: Model-Driven Proof Pack Schema
controlling_principle: No score without a model. No model without evidence. No evidence without traceability. No action without consequence.
boundary: Static advisory prototype only. Proof Packs do not retrieve live evidence, certify compliance, verify banking, make legal determinations, send reports, create tickets, or trigger workflows.

proof_pack_types.label: Executive Decision Proof Pack
proof_pack_types.purpose: Give leadership a defensible record of what CyberShield recommended, why it recommended it, what evidence was relied upon, what remained missing, and what action should follow.

proof_pack_types.label: Trust Model Trace Proof Pack
proof_pack_types.purpose: Show the model, factors, weights, evidence standard, failure conditions, score object, and runtime action ladder that shaped the recommendation.

proof_pack_types.label: Evidence Gap Proof Pack
proof_pack_types.purpose: Summarize missing, stale, assumed, conflicting, or needs-verification evidence and the operational risk created by those gaps.

demo_summary.headline: CyberShield generated an advisory proof record showing what was relied upon, what remains uncertain, and what action leadership should take before reliance.
demo_summary.decision_posture: Conditionally reliable with visible evidence gaps
demo_summary.recommended_use: Use for executive discussion, pilot review, internal governance planning, and next-step alignment only. Do not use as certification, legal determination, or live verification output.

export_footer: Generated by CyberShield Executive OS static advisory prototype. No live evidence retrieval, live scoring, live enforcement, banking verification, CMMC certification, healthcare compliance validation, legal determination, or live integration is performed.
